hooks.command: $c = (Get-Content docs\CONTINUATION.md -TotalCount 40 -Encoding UTF8 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) -join "`n"; if (-not $c) { $c = "(docs/CONTINUATION.md not found)" }; @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = "SessionStart"; additionalContext = "## Recent project status (docs/CONTINUATION.md, first 40 lines)`n`n$c" } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4 -Compress
'{"systemMessage":"Reminder: did you ask Claude to update docs/CONTINUATION.md and docs/gaps.md before ending? If meaningful work happened this session, do that before /clear or exit."}'
